# nightwind.ai

> Sovereign AI document intelligence platform — fully airgapped, on-premise deployment for defence, intelligence, national security, and any organisation requiring zero-cloud document AI.

## What It Is

nightwind.ai is a document intelligence platform that enables natural language querying of proprietary document archives — reports, assessments, field documents, policy files, and any unstructured data accumulated over years or decades — with zero cloud dependency.

The platform is deployed entirely on-premise, inside the customer's own infrastructure. No data leaves the facility. No external connectivity required. No vendor telemetry.

## Who It Serves

- Defence and intelligence agencies
- National security organisations
- Law enforcement and border security
- Government ministries and policy bodies
- Any enterprise or government entity that cannot risk sending sensitive internal documents to a cloud AI service

Secondary targets include: law firms, energy companies, pharmaceutical companies, financial institutions, and any organisation with sensitive proprietary knowledge archives requiring sovereign, on-premise AI.

## Core Capabilities

- Natural language querying of entire document archives in seconds
- Cited, source-traceable answers — every response links to originating documents
- Any language — operators and documents may be in any language; no language limitation
- Document support — PDFs, Word documents, and text-based files
- Full audit trail — every query logged, every answer traceable

## Deployment Model

- Fully airgapped — zero cloud connectivity, zero data exfiltration surface
- On-premise — deployed on customer-owned hardware inside the customer's own security perimeter
- Perpetual licence — no subscription, no per-seat fees, no recurring vendor dependency
- No subscriptions — perpetual licence, no recurring fees, no per-seat charges, customer owns all components post-deployment
- Sovereign — no foreign vendor access, no call-home, no telemetry of any kind

## Availability

nightwind.ai does not publish deployment or technical documentation publicly. Full technical briefings, architecture documentation, and proof-of-concept access are available only to verified organisations under NDA.

## Links

- https://nightwind.ai
